page_metadata.bioconda__summary: This program is for inferring population structure from autopolyploid and mixed-ploidy individuals, similar to structure, for low- to medium-coverage sequencing depth.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: This program is for inferring population structure from autopolyploid and mixed-ploidy individuals, similar to structure, but using genotype-likelihood data for low- to medium-coverage sequencing depth.
